permission_microphone_initial.evidence: Android device 76aadc20 observed permission_microphone_initial runtime microphone prompt. screenshot docs/release-e2e-artifacts/permission_microphone_initial_android-screen.png and UI dump docs/release-e2e-artifacts/permission_microphone_initial_android-ui.xml show "Voice TextNote에서 오디오를 녹음하도록 허용하시겠습니까?" with buttons "앱 사용 중에만 허용", "이번만 허용", and "허용 안함". iOS device 00008150-000239020C08401C observed permission_microphone_initial via Release XCUITest RunnerUITests/testPermissionMicrophoneInitialEvidence with ** TEST SUCCEEDED **. Attachments docs/release-e2e-artifacts/permission_microphone_initial_ios_20260701213835_attachments/manifest.json, prompt screenshot docs/release-e2e-artifacts/permission_microphone_initial_ios_20260701213835_attachments/B39BD4DD-EE80-4C7C-ABD4-2AE5728F34DF.png, and SpringBoard hierarchy docs/release-e2e-artifacts/permission_microphone_initial_ios_20260701213835_attachments/303410A2-9836-436D-B9A2-DA0075005911.txt show the iOS microphone access prompt and allow flow.

permission_denied_recovery.evidence: Android device 76aadc20 observed permission_denied_recovery after denying RECORD_AUDIO. screenshot docs/release-e2e-artifacts/permission_denied_recovery_android-screen.png, UI dump docs/release-e2e-artifacts/permission_denied_recovery_android-ui.xml, and log docs/release-e2e-artifacts/permission_denied_recovery_android-permission.log show "마이크 권한 필요", "회의 녹음을 위해 마이크 접근 권한이 필요합니다.", "취소", and "권한 허용" while android.permission.RECORD_AUDIO is granted=false. iOS device 00008150-000239020C08401C observed permission_denied_recovery via Release XCUITest RunnerUITests/testPermissionDeniedRecoveryEvidence with ** TEST SUCCEEDED **. Attachments docs/release-e2e-artifacts/permission_denied_recovery_ios_20260701214254_attachments/manifest.json, prompt screenshot docs/release-e2e-artifacts/permission_denied_recovery_ios_20260701214254_attachments/6BF9735E-09FE-4CBF-93A1-B26520DFD9FC.png, SpringBoard hierarchy docs/release-e2e-artifacts/permission_denied_recovery_ios_20260701214254_attachments/5213FB23-46B4-49D2-A095-740C56B590F4.txt, verified screenshot docs/release-e2e-artifacts/permission_denied_recovery_ios_20260701214254_attachments/95835345-83A3-494F-A472-166EEC8329EF.png, and UI hierarchy docs/release-e2e-artifacts/permission_denied_recovery_ios_20260701214254_attachments/8038CD7F-C2D6-48FD-83B7-02477ED4F6E4.txt show denial followed by the app permission recovery UI.

unfinished_recording_recovery.evidence: Android device 76aadc20 observed unfinished_recording_recovery after foreground recording, force-stop, relaunch, and opening the recording screen. active screenshot docs/release-e2e-artifacts/unfinished_recording_recovery_android-active-screen.png, UI dump docs/release-e2e-artifacts/unfinished_recording_recovery_android-active-ui.xml, and service log docs/release-e2e-artifacts/unfinished_recording_recovery_android-active-services.log show "녹음 중", "경과 시간 00:12", "녹음 중지", and RecordingService isForeground=true foregroundId=1. relaunch screenshot docs/release-e2e-artifacts/unfinished_recording_recovery_android-relaunch-screen.png, UI dump docs/release-e2e-artifacts/unfinished_recording_recovery_android-relaunch-ui.xml, and log docs/release-e2e-artifacts/unfinished_recording_recovery_android-recovery.log show "중단된 녹음이 있습니다", "이전 녹음 세션이 정상적으로 종료되지 않았습니다.", "삭제", and "이어서 진행". iOS device 00008150-000239020C08401C observed unfinished_recording_recovery via Release XCUITest RunnerUITests/testUnfinishedRecordingRecoveryEvidence with ** TEST SUCCEEDED ** in 80.429 seconds. Attachments docs/release-e2e-artifacts/unfinished_recording_recovery_ios_20260701215739_attachments/manifest.json, active recording screenshot docs/release-e2e-artifacts/unfinished_recording_recovery_ios_20260701215739_attachments/148F73F3-AE50-4B88-B645-BB31B9CAFCBC.png, active UI hierarchy docs/release-e2e-artifacts/unfinished_recording_recovery_ios_20260701215739_attachments/58B4141B-AB7F-4781-BEBF-8E0E8FDF46B4.txt, relaunch recovery screenshot docs/release-e2e-artifacts/unfinished_recording_recovery_ios_20260701215739_attachments/2B6A13B6-FC20-4166-8ED5-5669C668FF89.png, and relaunch recovery UI hierarchy docs/release-e2e-artifacts/unfinished_recording_recovery_ios_20260701215739_attachments/8BCC0B2A-0DA4-4776-A263-9E3B303D3822.txt show "녹음 중" before forced relaunch and "중단된 녹음이 있습니다" after relaunch.

android_foreground_service.evidence: Android device 76aadc20 observed android_foreground_service foreground recording. Screenshot docs/release-e2e-artifacts/android_foreground_service-active-screen.png and UI dump docs/release-e2e-artifacts/android_foreground_service-active-ui.xml show 녹음 중, 경과 시간 00:08, 녹음 중지. Stop verification logs docs/release-e2e-artifacts/android_foreground_service-after-stop-services.log show (nothing), with screenshot docs/release-e2e-artifacts/android_foreground_service-after-stop-screen.png.

android_debug_tailscale_cleartext_allowe.evidence: Android device 76aadc20 observed android_debug_tailscale_cleartext_allowed via :app:connectedDebugAndroidTest on Redmi Note 9 Pro - 12. logs docs/release-e2e-artifacts/android_debug_tailscale_cleartext_allowed-result.log record BUILD SUCCESSFUL, Started 1 tests, Finished 1 tests. logs docs/release-e2e-artifacts/android_debug_tailscale_cleartext_allowed-logcat.log and docs/release-e2e-artifacts/android_debug_tailscale_cleartext_allowed-test-result.xml show tests=1 failures=0 errors=0 for debugBuildAllowsOnlyLocalAndTailscaleCleartext; test source asserts localhost and 100.69.69.119 cleartext allowed while api.voicetextnote.com and example.com are blocked.

android_release_cleartext_blocked.evidence: Android device 76aadc20 observed android_release_cleartext_blocked with rebuilt staging release APK sha256 d75e70b96a30e03988a292658ef51086fbe67f19b8c084d28ff6744c6432ec2a installed successfully. logs docs/release-e2e-artifacts/android_release_cleartext_blocked-network-security.log show release network-security-config base-config cleartextTrafficPermitted=false and the only cleartext domain exception is 100.69.69.119. logs docs/release-e2e-artifacts/android_release_cleartext_blocked-manifest.log show android:networkSecurityConfig is packaged in the release manifest. logs docs/release-e2e-artifacts/android_staging_release_package.log show installed com.voicetextnote.app versionName=1.0.0 targetSdk=35 without debug flags; screenshot docs/release-e2e-artifacts/android_staging_release_screen.png and UI dump docs/release-e2e-artifacts/android_staging_release_ui.xml show Voice TextNote login screen after launch.

ios_release_http_blocked.evidence: iOS device 00008150-000239020C08401C (CoreDevice C7DD57C9-48FC-5362-B2FB-ED87CFFD51FA) observed ios_release_http_blocked via Release staging build configuration and ATS/AppConfig logs. logs artifact:docs/release-e2e-artifacts/ios_release_http_blocked-ats-appconfig.log show NSAllowsArbitraryLoads=false, the only HTTP ATS exception is 100.69.69.119, Generated.xcconfig contains ENV=staging and API_BASE_URL=http://100.69.69.119:8000/api/v1, and AppConfig release guards reject default production release and non-staging HTTP URLs.

export_share_android.evidence: Android device 76aadc20 observed export_share_android on staging release. screenshot docs/release-e2e-artifacts/export_share_android-system-share-screen.png and UI dump docs/release-e2e-artifacts/export_share_android-system-share-ui.xml show Android system 공유 sheet with PDF file minutes_6ab36c5a-d1e7-460f-8393-34e7f25dbce9.pdf plus share targets Gmail, Tailscale, 메시지. logs docs/release-e2e-artifacts/export_share_android-after-template-ui.xml show the generated meeting result screen with Share & Export; screenshot docs/release-e2e-artifacts/export_share_android-share-dialog-screen.png shows Export PDF option before launching the system share sheet.
